recommendations.title: Live Twice, Love Once
recommendations.overview: A retired academic teacher tries to find the love of his youth after being diagnosed with Alzheimer's.

recommendations.title: American Carnage

recommendations.title: Lou
recommendations.overview: A Pixar short about a lost-and-found box and the unseen monster within.

recommendations.title: The Care Bears Movie
recommendations.overview: The Care Bears team up with a troubled brother and sister who just moved to a new town to help a neglected young magician's apprentice whose evil spell book causes sinister things to happen.

recommendations.title: Tricky Old Dogs
recommendations.overview: Two septuagenarians go to Tuscany to prevent their old friend from killing the man who cuckolded him fifty years ago.

recommendations.title: We Will Go
recommendations.overview: An unexpected road trip brings a dysfunctional family together for one last journey with their elder, sparking moments of connection, joy, and reconciliation.

recommendations.title: Barefoot in the Park
recommendations.overview: In this film based on a Neil Simon play, newlyweds Corie, a free spirit, and Paul Bratter, an uptight lawyer, share a sixth-floor apartment in Greenwich Village. Soon after their marriage, Corie tries to find a companion for mother, Ethel, who is now

recommendations.title: The Swallows of Kabul
recommendations.overview: Summer 1998—Kabul under Taliban rule. Zunaira and Mohsen are young and in love. Despite the daily violence and misery, they hope for a better future. One day, a foolish gesture causes life to take an irrevocable turn.

recommendations.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Adventure, Drama, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Arnold and his friends must recover a stolen document in order to prevent the neighborhood from being bulldozed.

recommendations.title: Short Term 12
recommendations.overview: Grace, a compassionate young supervisor at a foster care facility, helps at-risk teens. But when a new charge dredges up memories of her own troubled past, Grace's tough exterior begins eroding.
